game.name: Serada 9 Sector
game.description:
This is a battle for the Serada 9 Sector. The battle will be won when one commander captures 200 planets, or an alliance of two commanders capture 250 planets and hold them for 5 consecutive turns. This battle will run every day for 15 turns and then will drop to 3 turns per week.

Fight or Fail! You must control at least the number of planets shown to stay alive in this game. The Fight or Fail limit will increase every 5 Turns.

Accelerated Start! You can play your first 3 turns immediately, without having to wait for other players.

[2024 Standard Rules]

messages.headline: VGA Planets Nu
messages.body: Your alliance currently controls enough of the planets to win this sector. You must continue to hold for 0 more turns to gain total control of the Serada 9 Sector and be victorious!

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Thank you for reaching out to me and taking me with you on long road to victory for this game.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body: Correction: GA on 2 of your planets.

mymessages.headline: The Hordes of Fury (golf)
mymessages.body:
No more requests.

If it goes as planned I will take 4 CoM planets this turn. Also trying to take some Bird planets. And p 31 from the Lizards. GA on 1 of your planets too if I counted correctly. Will see what happens.

Marking turn ready now.

hulls.name: Swift Heart Class Scout
hulls.special: Nebula Scanner - Can detect ships or planets within a nebula up to 100ly away at any intensity.

hulls.name: Br4 Class Gunship
hulls.special: Gravitonic - This ship moves twice as far as normal ships at the same warp speed using Gravitonic Accellerators.

advantages.name: Fed Crew Bonus
advantages.description: Fed ships will fight with an extra 50kt of hull mass, fighter ships will fight as if they have 3 extra fighter bays, damaged Fed ships will fight with all their weapons and 25% shields are recovered between fights.

advantages.name: 200% Taxing
advantages.description: The Solar Federation is very good at making friends with the natives that they contact. They collect twice the megacredits per turn per tax rate percentage point from both the natives and the colonists.

advantages.name: Super Refit
advantages.description: Federation starbases may upgrade the parts on Federation owned ships after they are built.

advantages.name: 70% Mining
advantages.description: Due to regulations protecting the environment and native life the Federation can only mine at 70% of normal rates.

advantages.name: Lizard Crew Bonus
advantages.description: Lizard ships can take up to 150% damage before blowing up.
